description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow surrounded by a low boundary wall and featuring a spacious front and back yard with manicured lawns and shrubbery. The house has a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout, with large windows distributed along the exterior walls. A driveway leads to a car parked in front of the main entrance, and there is a paved walkway connecting the driveway to the front door. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and a round hot tub, as well as a small garden section. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray color, and the property is bordered by a combination of hedges and stone fencing. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and functional, modern living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and spacious front and back yards, featuring a driveway, patio, and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with a car, and the expansive front lawn bordered by hedges and a stone wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, car, and the large open backyard with a patio and hot tub visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, patio area, hot tub, and garden, with the flat roof and window arrangement visible.
description_view_3: Side/rear view focusing on the backyard, patio, and garden, with the driveway and car partially visible in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large windows distributed along all facades
